mapper.select: SELECT a.account_id, a.account_name, a.email, r.role_name, a.account_status, a.tenant_id, a.seller_id, a.warehouse_id, a.worker_code, a.last_login_at, a.created_at FROM account a JOIN role r ON r.role_id = a.role_id WHERE (#{tenantId} IS NULL OR a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}) AND (#{roleName} IS NULL OR r.role_name = #{roleName}) AND (#{accountStatus} IS NULL OR a.account_status = #{accountStatus}) AND (#{keyword} IS NULL OR a.account_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.worker_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
